baseVariables.name: base-accent-color
baseVariables.usage: Accent color used for focus ring and (when no itemStyles) the active state

baseVariables.name: base-primary-bg
baseVariables.usage: Background of the off / unselected switch surface (the whole switch container)

baseVariables.name: base-accent-color-light
baseVariables.usage: Inactive step segment background (the 'placeholder' boxes behind each step in MultiSwitch). Auto-generated by theme-designer as accent at ~10% opacity.

baseVariables.name: base-accent-color-light-hover
baseVariables.usage: Active step segment background (the placeholder under the thumb). Slightly stronger version of accent-color-light.

baseVariables.name: base-text-color-on-accent
baseVariables.usage: Thumb fill — must contrast with the switch surface in any theme (typically white)

baseVariables.name: base-border-radius-sm
baseVariables.usage: Corner radius coefficient (multiplied by --sw-rem). 0.4 → 4px at default rem; 2.4 → pillow corners; 0 → sharp.

baseVariables.name: base-font-size-sm
baseVariables.usage: Label font size coefficient (multiplied by --sw-rem). 1.4 → 14px at default rem; 1.6 → 16px.

componentVariables.name: sw-bg-off
componentVariables.usage: Switch background when off / not on selected step

componentVariables.name: sw-bg-on
componentVariables.usage: Switch background when checked (binary Switch). Defaults to --base-accent-color so the toggle flips to accent on activation

componentVariables.name: sw-thumb-border-color
componentVariables.usage: Thumb border color (defaults to transparent — set per-theme/per-instance when a visible outline is wanted)

componentVariables.name: sw-step-bg
componentVariables.usage: Inactive step segment background (MultiSwitch). Defaults to a light-theme-friendly tint; dark themes MUST set this explicitly

componentVariables.name: sw-step-bg-active
componentVariables.usage: Active step segment background (MultiSwitch). Defaults to a light-theme-friendly tint; dark themes MUST set this explicitly

componentVariables.name: sw-label-hover-bg
componentVariables.usage: Background flash on hover for clickable per-step labels. Defaults to a light-theme-friendly tint; dark themes should override

componentVariables.name: sw-label-hover-bg-active
componentVariables.usage: Background flash on hover for the currently-active clickable label. Defaults to a light-theme-friendly tint; dark themes should override

componentVariables.name: sw-rem
componentVariables.usage: Base sizing unit (default 10px). Multiplied by coefficient-based sizes (border-radius, font-size). Set to `1rem` for pure-admin contexts where html { font-size: 10px }.

componentVariables.name: sw-border-radius
componentVariables.usage: Corner radius coefficient (multiplied by --sw-rem). Same convention as --base-border-radius-sm.

componentVariables.name: steps
componentVariables.usage: Number of steps in MultiSwitch (auto-set from props)
